## Summary

Brief description of changes.

## Type
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] New provider adapter
- [ ] New tool (free)
- [ ] New tool (pro)
- [ ] Documentation

## Checklist
- [ ] Tests pass (`npm test`)
- [ ] TypeScript compiles (`npm run build`)
- [ ] New tests added for new features
- [ ] README updated if tools were added or changed
- [ ] Pro tools call `requirePro()` at the start of the handler
